replies.msg:
Please consider that there is high risk of misfire in a very dense and crowded area !!
If anyone in other non-interested groups get injured in even one single incident, ALL opponent groups will make it the BIGGEST news on earth.
e.g. regular HK people, ladies, kids, reporters, protestors, foreigners, etc..

Hopefully wind factor may sometimes be an issue too. If it is liquid, then it may be spread to other areas which are hard to estimate.


If you choose to do it,, exercise with EXTREME caution !! A small spark of MISTAKE can ignite the fire for the whole forest.
Take it very seriously.
